description: StateBackedComponent — runs the LLM planner + real materializations once at prepare time (write_state_to_path) and caches the full plan. build_defs_from_state builds REAL Dagster assets from the cached plan on every subsequent load. Zero LLM cost after prepare. Perfect for the 'input a task in Dagster+ UI, real assets appear' UX.

outputs.description: Emits N real Dagster assets — one per pick from the cached plan.

task.description: The task the agent plans against.

tpm_budget.description: OpenAI TPM budget for a single request. When set, the component progressively trims catalog contents (hints, descriptions, entries) to fit tpm_budget-2000. OpenAI tiers: T1=30000, T2=500000, T3=5000000. Prefer narrowing include_ids over setting this — smaller filter + rich hints beats big filter + no hints.
